summary: Completed testing of Start Day Dashboard (Iteration 8). All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All 13 frontend tests passed (100%). The Start Day page loads correctly after login, displays all required data (cash balance, bridge status, held orders, stock alerts, checklist), and navigation works properly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/daily/opening-summary returns 200
Backend: Opening summary has all required fields (data, sold_casa, cash_in, cash_out, vanzari_numerar, total_vanzari, numar_vanzari, bridge_connected, comenzi_hold, alerte_stoc, fara_stoc, ora)
Backend: Opening summary field types are correct (strings, numbers, boolean)
Backend: Date format is YYYY-MM-DD, time format is HH:MM
Backend: Cash balance calculation correct (sold_casa = cash_in - cash_out + vanzari_numerar)
Backend: Bridge status correctly shows disconnected in test environment
Backend: Opening summary requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Casier role can access opening summary
Backend: All count fields are non-negative
Backend: Held orders count matches /api/held-orders total
Backend: Stock alerts count is valid (>= API results which are limited to 200)
Frontend: Login redirects to /start-day (not /pos)
Frontend: Start Day page loads with data-testid='start-day-page'
Frontend: Cash balance displayed (555,60 RON)
Frontend: Bridge status displayed (Deconectata)
Frontend: Held orders count displayed (1)
Frontend: Stock status displayed (5697 fara stoc, 5697 alerte)
Frontend: Refresh button (Actualizeaza) visible and clickable
Frontend: INCEPE ZIUA button visible and clickable
Frontend: INCEPE ZIUA navigates to /pos
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Deschidere Zi' navigation link
Frontend: Sidebar navigation to /start-day works
Frontend: POS page loads correctly after navigation from start-day
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 Start Day Dashboard fully tested. Key points: (1) GET /api/daily/opening-summary returns complete data including sold_casa, bridge_connected, comenzi_hold, alerte_stoc, fara_stoc. (2) After login, user is redirected to /start-day (not /pos). (3) INCEPE ZIUA button navigates to /pos. (4) Actualizeaza button refreshes data. (5) Sidebar includes 'Deschidere Zi' link. (6) Bridge is NOT running in test env so bridge_connected=false. (7) Electron desktop app files are config-only and cannot be runtime-tested.
electron_setup_note: Electron files (electron/main.js, electron/preload.js, electron-builder.json) are config-only for future desktop build and cannot be runtime-tested in this cloud environment.
